items.title: Google sues alleged Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to send scam texts
items.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: $130 billion in data center projects blocked by protests so far this year
items.summary: Winning fight against AI data centers gives people a "taste of political power."
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: China Didn't Make People Hate Data Centers
items.summary: GOP lawmakers, tech investors, and even OpenAI have tied the anti-data center movement in the US to Chinese interference. Experts say it’s much more complicated than that.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
